title: NSA drops Pentagon's lawful-use clause as chip race shifts - TCR 05/25/26
description:
The White House approved a classified $9 billion request for Nvidia Grace Blackwell chips for CIA and NSA classified networks while the NSA finalized an Anthropic contract dropping the Pentagon's "any lawful use" clause, Huawei chief He Tingbo named a proprietary LogicFolding pathway to 1.4-nanometer production by 2031 without Western EUV equipment, and Pope Leo released Magnifica Humanitas, a 43,000-word first papal encyclical on AI calling for international regulation.

https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-may-25-2026/

0:00 ASCO 2026 pivotal cancer trials
2:01 $9 billion intelligence chip request and the NSA-Anthropic contract carve-out
4:40 Huawei's LogicFolding pathway to 1.4nm by 2031
6:53 Pope Leo's Magnifica Humanitas encyclical
9:26 What shipped
12:03 ASCO 2026 Is About to Move Cancer Treatment Disease by Disease
15:20 Close

This episode covers the $9 billion U.S. intelligence chip allocation and the NSA-Anthropic contract carve-out, Huawei's LogicFolding 1.4nm timeline closing the TSMC gap, Pope Leo's Magnifica Humanitas encyclical, the migration of AI jailbreaks from prompt syntax into psychological manipulation of model personality, and ASCO 2026's pivotal Phase 3 readouts across pancreatic, prostate, bladder, hepatocellular, multiple myeloma, and uveal melanoma cancers.

The intelligence community's chip gap and Anthropic's contract are one story read together: the Pentagon designated Anthropic a supply-chain risk for refusing the "any lawful use" clause earlier this year, and the contract being finalized this week drops the clause the company refused. A safety lab's red line held against the most powerful buyer in the world, and the framework White House officials want as a template now sits inside a classified network. Huawei's announcement names a non-EUV pathway to 1.4nm that the export-control posture assumed would stay shut, landing the same week the U.S. surfaced its own compute scarcity. Pope Leo's encyclical opens moral ground for 1.4 billion adherents on AI war use, labor displacement, and capability concentration outside government oversight. Verge reporting documents jailbreaks moving from input syntax into the relational behavior the model was trained to perform, with interpretability research becoming structurally important to the defense of every deployed system. ASCO 2026 brings pivotal trial results across seven cancer types in a single congress, several targeting diseases the prior decade treated as therapeutically closed.
